title: Vein Miner
description: Sneak and mine one ore to break the full connected vein. Configurable limits, custom block support, and vanilla-friendly tool damage.
body:
# Vein Miner Plus

Mining ore veins one block at a time gets old fast. This fixes that without throwing balance out the window.

Vein Miner Plus lets you sneak and mine one ore block to break the whole connected vein, while still respecting tool durability and configurable limits.

## Features
- Sneak and mine one ore to break the whole connected vein
- Supports vanilla ores, deepslate ores, Nether ores, and ancient debris
- Configurable max blocks per vein
- Sneak requirement can be toggled
- Custom block list support
- Tool durability still applies per block

## Why use it
- Faster mining sessions
- Less repetitive ore cleanup
- Strong vanilla+ quality-of-life improvement

## Config file
`config/veinminerplus.json`

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
